arts.ttl: 'Dreadful game, Tough, tough evening, Uncharacteristically quiet': Neil Allen's Portsmouth player ratings against Derby
arts.sum: Awful Pompey slumped to a 4-0 defeat at Derby following a wretched display.

arts.ttl: Derby County suffer big injury blow in Championship clash with Portsmouth
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Cashin then added a second before Adams made it 3-0 to Derby before half-time as the Rams received a standing ovation at the break.

arts.ttl: Derby County player ratings v Portsmouth as rampant Rams crush Pompey but suffer Eiran Cashin blow - Leigh Curtis
arts.sum: And Warne's side then made it three when more good work from Mendez-Laing saw him feed Craig Forsyth whose cross was met by Ebou Adams with his shot taking a deflection off Tom Mcintyre. Kane Wilson got the ball rolling when he raced into the box to meet a Nathaniel Mendez-Laing cross after Ebou Adams and Marcus Harness had combined in midfield.
Highlights of the Sky Bet Championship match between Derby County and Portsmouth.

arts.ttl: Derby thump Portsmouth to end six-game winless run
arts.sum: Derby ended a run of six games without a win in emphatic style as a dominant first-half display helped them to a 4-0 win over Portsmouth, to take them seven points above their opponents and the drop zone.

arts.ttl: Derby 4 Portsmouth 0: Neil Allen's verdict - Display of cataclysmic awfulness brings Blues crashing back to earth
arts.sum: After so much progress of late, Pompey came thundering back down to earth with a display of cataclysmic awfulness.

arts.ttl: Derby cruise past Portsmouth to end six-game winless run
arts.sum: Kane Wilson, Eiran Cashin and Ebou Adams all struck before half-time.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne rings changes as he picks Derby County team to face Portsmouth
arts.sum: Callum Elder, Joe Ward, Liam Thompson, Dajaune Brown and Nat Phillips all drop to the bench for the Championship clash with Kane Wilson, Craig Forsyth, Ben Osborn, Marcus Harness and Nathaniel Mendez-Laing returning. Derby (4-3-3): Zetterstrom; Wilson, Nelson, Cashin, Forsyth; Adams, Osborn, Goudmijn; Mendez-Laing, Yates, Harness

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss errs on the side of caution amid three changes against Derby
arts.sum: Regan Poole isn’t risked the starting line-up against Derby - but Pompey welcome back two players from suspension.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth set for biggest away following of the season as Watford and Bristol City details emerge
arts.sum: Pompey fans are clearly not concerned by the amount of travelling they’ll have to do over the festive period.
